TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: udadan nu balaki haymaw sa Śú®śľłśľłŤģäŤÄĀÁöĄŤ∑Įšłä amana katawal sakapahen ku udip ŤęčŚą•ŚŅėšļÜŚĖĄŚĺÖŤá™Ś∑Ī. patinaku satu cayay katineng tu udip a tademaw, katineng misakapah tu udip nu udip, matinengay tu udip niculil u kapahay tu. nikaudip nu tademaw , paayawiy ku udip, anu caay kisu kasaetin tu udipisu, cima ku midatengay tisuwan. katineng, ukalisiw caykaham aetanan, ukawaw caay kahamin, mabaluduh tu mahinaay, upisinanut tu udip ku kapahay. Pisakapahi tu udip, kanaha tu maedem ku nikaydih , kapah henay misumad tu kaudip, wicakuyca. anu mangelu' ku nikaudip amana kapawan tu udip, hatida ku nayinu lawad pahanhanni tu. . minana misakapah tu udip , nikaudip sa lihalay. . nikaudipan , katineng " maudip caay alayi mapatay caay kelidi" tatenga kunakawaw, payawan anu cacanan sadikuday sa naynayi ku niyala. . caykaala ku cacanan, nikabalakian a dadan, sakapah hank u udip. . amankasa balakitu kiya misakapah tu udip, tatenga balakitu, yadatu ku sapisaasu a eking. .
S.PHON: udadan nu bar~…ĺaki ńßajmaw sa ******** amana katawar~…ĺ sakapańß…ôn ku udip ********. patinaku satu ¶ajaj katin…ôŇč tu udip a tad…ômaw, katin…ôŇč misakapańß tu udip nu udip, matin…ôŇčaj tu udip ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ u kapańßaj tu. nikaudip nu tad…ômaw , paajawij ku udip, anu ¶aaj kisu kasa…ôtin tu udipisu, ¶ima ku midat…ôŇčaj tisuwan. katin…ôŇč, ukar~…ĺisiw ¶ajkańßam a…ôtanan, ukawaw ¶aaj kańßamin, mabar~…ĺuduńß tu mańßinaaj, upisinanut tu udip ku kapańßaj. pisakapańßi tu udip, kanańßa tu ma…ôd…ôm ku nikajdińß , kapańß ńß…ônaj misumad tu kaudip, wi ¶akuj ¶a. anu maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku nikaudip amana kapawan tu udip, ńßatida ku najinu r~…ĺawad pańßanńßanni tu. . minana misakapańß tu udip , nikaudip sa r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj. . nikaudipan , katin…ôŇč " maudip ¶aaj ar~…ĺaji mapataj ¶aaj k…ôr~…ĺidi" tat…ôŇča kunakawaw, pajawan anu ¶a ¶anan sadikudaj sa najnaji ku nijar~…ĺa. . ¶ajkaar~…ĺa ku ¶a ¶anan, nikabar~…ĺakian a dadan, sakapańß ńßank u udip. . amankasa bar~…ĺakitu kija misakapańß tu udip, tat…ôŇča bar~…ĺakitu, jadatu ku sapisaasu a …ôkiŇč. .
S.FORM: udadan nu balaki haymaw sa Śú®śľłśľłŤģäŤÄĀÁöĄŤ∑Įšłä amana katawal sakapahen ku udip ŤęčŚą•ŚŅėšļÜŚĖĄŚĺÖŤá™Ś∑Ī. patinaku satu cayay katineng tu udip a tademaw, katineng misakapah tu udip nu udip, matinengay tu udip niculil u kapahay tu. nikaudip nu tademaw , paayawiy ku udip, anu caay kisu kasaetin tu udipisu, cima ku midatengay tisuwan. katineng, ukalisiw caykaham aetanan, ukawaw caay kahamin, mabaluduh tu mahinaay, upisinanut tu udip ku kapahay. Pisakapahi tu udip, kanaha tu maedem ku nikaydih , kapah henay misumad tu kaudip, wicakuyca. anu mangelu' ku nikaudip amana kapawan tu udip, hatida ku nayinu lawad pahanhanni tu. . minana misakapah tu udip , nikaudip sa lihalay. . nikaudipan , katineng " maudip caay alayi mapatay caay kelidi" tatenga kunakawaw, payawan anu cacanan sadikuday sa naynayi ku niyala. . caykaala ku cacanan, nikabalakian a dadan, sakapah hank u udip. . amankasa balakitu kiya misakapah tu udip, tatenga balakitu, yadatu ku sapisaasu a eking. .
S.PHON: udadan nu bar~…ĺaki ńßajmaw sa ******** amana katawar~…ĺ sakapańß…ôn ku udip ********. patinaku satu ¶ajaj katin…ôŇč tu udip a tad…ômaw, katin…ôŇč misakapańß tu udip nu udip, matin…ôŇčaj tu udip ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ u kapańßaj tu. nikaudip nu tad…ômaw , paajawij ku udip, anu ¶aaj kisu kasa…ôtin tu udipisu, ¶ima ku midat…ôŇčaj tisuwan. katin…ôŇč, ukar~…ĺisiw ¶ajkańßam a…ôtanan, ukawaw ¶aaj kańßamin, mabar~…ĺuduńß tu mańßinaaj, upisinanut tu udip ku kapańßaj. pisakapańßi tu udip, kanańßa tu ma…ôd…ôm ku nikajdińß , kapańß ńß…ônaj misumad tu kaudip, wi ¶akuj ¶a. anu maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku nikaudip amana kapawan tu udip, ńßatida ku najinu r~…ĺawad pańßanńßanni tu. . minana misakapańß tu udip , nikaudip sa r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj. . nikaudipan , katin…ôŇč " maudip ¶aaj ar~…ĺaji mapataj ¶aaj k…ôr~…ĺidi" tat…ôŇča kunakawaw, pajawan anu ¶a ¶anan sadikudaj sa najnaji ku nijar~…ĺa. . ¶ajkaar~…ĺa ku ¶a ¶anan, nikabar~…ĺakian a dadan, sakapańß ńßank u udip. . amankasa bar~…ĺakitu kija misakapańß tu udip, tat…ôŇča bar~…ĺakitu, jadatu ku sapisaasu a …ôkiŇč. .
